checklist.detail: All 5 plan requirements met: partitionByLanguage splits by analyzer registration (card.go:307-318), banner added to both FormatCardText (card.go:198-207) and FormatCardMarkdown (card.go:266-276), aggregates use supported-only in GenerateCard/Health/Detailed/Full, denominator surfaced via AnalyzableUnits and banner text, badge tests confirm supported-only totals. Minor: uses analyzer-check instead of Unsupported==true flag, and banner wording differs from plan's exact example.
checklist.label: Implements the approved plan

checklist.detail: Plan listed target file as report.go but diff touches 10 files (card.go, detailed.go, full.go, health.go, plus 5 test files, plus testdata fixture). All changes are thematically required for the 5 plan objectives and there is no unrelated churn, but the spread exceeds the single-file expectation.
checklist.label: Minimal and scoped

checklist.detail: Tests exercise real scenarios (mixed/all-supported/all-unsupported) with concrete score assertions (e.g., OverallScore = (0.95+0.85+0.20)/3, TotalUnits=3 for supported-only). No test deletion, no weakened assertions, no hard-coded expected values. New tests in card_test.go, badge_test.go, detailed_test.go, partition_test.go all validate genuine behavior.
checklist.label: No test-gaming / faking

checklist.detail: All-unsupported edge case returns N/A gracefully (card.go:79-83). Health handles empty supported slice (health.go:29). FullReport tags unsupported units as N/A with (unsupported) suffix rather than silently dropping them. Partition criterion uses analyzer registration which is the upstream source-of-truth, though differs from plan's 'Unsupported==true' description. No security or regression concerns; tests pass.
checklist.label: Safe to advance

checklist.detail: at or above the confidence bar
checklist.label: Judge confidence

dimensions.evidence: All 5 plan requirements met: partitionByLanguage splits by analyzer registration (card.go:307-318), banner added to both FormatCardText (card.go:198-207) and FormatCardMarkdown (card.go:266-276), aggregates use supported-only in GenerateCard/Health/Detailed/Full, denominator surfaced via AnalyzableUnits and banner text, badge tests confirm supported-only totals. Minor: uses analyzer-check instead of Unsupported==true flag, and banner wording differs from plan's exact example.

Plan listed target file as report.go but diff touches 10 files (card.go, detailed.go, full.go, health.go, plus 5 test files, plus testdata fixture). All changes are thematically required for the 5 plan objectives and there is no unrelated churn, but the spread exceeds the single-file expectation.

Tests exercise real scenarios (mixed/all-supported/all-unsupported) with concrete score assertions (e.g., OverallScore = (0.95+0.85+0.20)/3, TotalUnits=3 for supported-only). No test deletion, no weakened assertions, no hard-coded expected values. New tests in card_test.go, badge_test.go, detailed_test.go, partition_test.go all validate genuine behavior.

All-unsupported edge case returns N/A gracefully (card.go:79-83). Health handles empty supported slice (health.go:29). FullReport tags unsupported units as N/A with (unsupported) suffix rather than silently dropping them. Partition criterion uses analyzer registration which is the upstream source-of-truth, though differs from plan's 'Unsupported==true' description. No security or regression concerns; tests pass.
